TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Steve_Blake, title = Steve_Blake, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Steve_Blake} }

S.FORM: == Steve Blake == Steve Blake sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1980, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 2, Steve Blake, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' Washington Wizards (2003–2005) Kawas tay2003, galan tay 38 lpgan sisyuw na v qu Steve Blake. 5.9 tinsu' wal galun ni Terrell Brandon. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

== Steve Blake == Steve Blake sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1980, ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 2, Steve Blake, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' Washington Wizards (2003–2005) Kawas tay2003, galan tay 38 lpgan sisyuw na v qu Steve Blake. 5.9 tinsu' wal galun ni Terrell Brandon. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == s~ɕte*e βlake == s~ɕte*e βlake s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, s~ɕte*e βlake, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ was~ɕħiŋton wizar*s~ɕ (*********) kawas~ɕ taj****, ɣalan taj ** lpɣan s~ɕis~ɕjuw na * qu s~ɕte*e βlake. *.* tins~ɕuʔ wal ɣalun ni terrell βran*on. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
